permits.description: Perform necessary shoring and replace basement footings and columns per stamped structural plan at new lowered elevations. Excavate for, form and pour new steel reinforced conrete curbing per stamped structural plan for new lowered slabExcavate for and pour new concrete slab approximately 12 inches below existing elevation.

llm_assessment.reasoning: A significant $250,000 structural renovation to lower the basement slab following a recent purchase indicates a major value-add project, though the owner-occupied status and lack of explicit kitchen or bathroom updates keep the likelihood at medium.
